meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about a lack of portfolio. Leverage AI-driven Git workflows with Antigravity and Claude Code to build, ship, and prove your engineering value fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a perception gap. By using AI-augmented version control, you shift from 'showing code' to 'shipping outcomes.' Utilize Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative feature deployment. This workflow turns your development history into a verifiable, high-impact revenue engine for your SaaS.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the vision, the business logic, and the market insight, yet you are paralyzed by the 'no portfolio' stigma—the invisible wall between you and investor trust. While others waste months agonizing over aesthetic side projects, top-tier founders are now weaponizing the Git-AI feedback loop to build products that serve as their own proof of concept.

This isn't about writing more code; it's about shipping value at a velocity that renders traditional portfolios obsolete. By integrating Antigravity for structural integrity and Claude Code for intelligent, intent-based execution, you transform your repository into a living testament of your ability to solve complex, revenue-generating problems in real-time.

steps.title: Architecting the MVP Foundation
steps.description: Establish a robust project structure that scales. Use AI to generate a clean, modular repository that signals professionalism from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a production-ready SaaS boilerplate using Next.js 14, Tailwind, and Supabase. Implement strict TypeScript typing and folder structure following domain-driven design.

steps.title: Automating Feature Branching
steps.description: Maintain a clean commit history that tells a story of progress. AI ensures every branch is focused on a specific business outcome.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized feature branching workflow that enforces conventional commits and links every pull request to a specific user story or bug fix.

steps.title: Intelligent Code Review
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit your own logic, ensuring your MVP remains performant and secure before pushing to main.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review current implementation for performance bottlenecks in database queries and identify any security vulnerabilities in the API routing.

steps.title: Rapid Iteration Cycles
steps.description: Accelerate your build-measure-learn loop by automating the implementation of complex business logic based on user feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current checkout flow to support Stripe dynamic pricing based on the user's selected subscription tier.

steps.title: Showcasing the 'Shipping' Velocity
steps.description: Transform your commit history into a high-signal narrative that demonstrates your ability to finish what you start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a changelog and summary report that highlights the transition from prototype to functional MVP, emphasizing key milestones and business value delivered.

pro_tips: Never commit 'WIP' messages; configure Claude to auto-summarize your changes into professional, impact-focused commit messages.
Treat your GitHub 'Contributions' graph as your primary sales deck; prioritize daily small shipments over massive, infrequent code dumps.
Use Antigravity to create 'Decision Logs' in your repo; documenting WHY you chose a tech stack is more impressive to investors than just showing the code.
Automate your README with AI; it should focus on the business problem solved, not the libraries used.
Integrate a CI/CD pipeline early; showing a 'Green' build status is the ultimate signal of a founder who understands production-level reliability.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to Vercel or Railway, verify your domain, and start your first acquisition campaign to prove market viability.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a developer without a portfolio; you are a founder with a shipping track record. The tools are ready, the market is waiting, and your velocity is your greatest competitive advantage. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
